name: South Korea
summary: Day 67 Tuesday. **KOSPI +5.1% TO RECORD 6,936.99 — CLEANEST DECOUPLING SIGNAL OF CRISIS ARC.** SK Hynix +12.52% — market cap surpassed ₩1,000 trillion for first time, reaching ₩1,031 trillion. Foreign investors net bought ₩3.57 trillion in domestic stock market — record in 7 months. Institutions net-bought ₩1.94T. Combined Samsung + SK Hynix market cap share = 42.2% of KOSPI (all-time high concentration). More KOSPI stocks declined (476) than advanced (392) — concentration story. Operating profit estimates for Korean semis revised UP ~66% over past month. KOSPI +32.5% 1M, +29.2% 3M. Samsung Q1 8x YoY operating profit (57.2T won / ~$36B) + HBM4 mass production for Nvidia Vera Rubin + SK Hynix sufficient-inventory framing all combined with the May 1 Mag 7 beat-and-raise capex confirmation. **Cross-cutting signal:** SK-flagged HMM Namu (180m Panama-flagged, 24 crew incl. 6 Korean) damaged by explosion+fire in Hormuz May 4 — FIRST Korean commercial-fleet damage of crisis. KOSPI rallied to record close THE SAME DAY. AI-cycle demand has structurally separated from West Asia geopolitical risk. Helium-cascade thesis FALSIFIED at tier-1 chipmaker level (Samsung Q1 + SK Hynix Apr 23 framings hold). USD/KRW ₩1,475.61 (+0.3% Tue) — 2.2% strengthening 1M. Korea attracted record foreign inflows the same week India saw FPI outflows of ₹60,847 crore (April) — Asian risk-on rotation REAL but specifically AI-tech-driven, not pan-EM.

active_triggers.condition: Samsung or SK Hynix announces production halt due to helium shortage
